chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.10 of 2024 Arif Ahmed Bahalim & others Versus Mst. Mehmooda Naz & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A” 2. For orders on CMA 23/24 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA 24/24 Dated: 05.03.2024 None present for appellants. Mr. Kamran Khan for respondent No.5 on statutory notice. Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain for auction purchaser. -.-.- On the last date when the matter was called neither appellants nor their counsel were in attendance and today position is same. There is no intimation either. It seems that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Instant High Court Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
